emails.subject: Statoil/J Aron assignment
emails.body: Statoil/J Aron assignment As we have consented to the assignment of the trades under the Statoil Energy Trading ISDA to JAron, could you tell me what the timeline will be for moving these transactions in TAGG/ERMS to JAron? Thanks! Tanya 3-3263

emails.subject: Statoil/J Aron assignment
emails.body: Statoil/J Aron assignment As we have consented to the assignment of the trades under the Statoil Energy Trading ISDA to JAron, could you tell me what the timeline will be for moving these transactions in TAGG/ERMS to JAron? Thanks! Tanya 3-3263

emails.subject: Re: Statoil/J Aron assignment
emails.body: Re: Statoil/J Aron assignment Due to the volume of deals (260) related to this assignment, we've asked Curtis Smith in TAGG/IT Support to move these over in a batch process. I'll let you know a timeframe as soon as he gets back to me. thanks Joe From: Tanya Rohauer 05/09/2000 01:36 PM
